validations.remediation: Disable NFC on iOS and Android via configuration profiles.

validations.remediation: Ensure iOS and Android app protection policies restrict clipboard access for all managed apps.

validations.expectedValue: AirDrop and Nearby Share disabled on managed devices
validations.remediation: Create iOS supervised profile disabling AirDrop. Create Android configuration profile restricting Nearby Share.

validations.description: Siri and Google Assistant disabled to prevent voice-based data access.
validations.expectedValue: Voice assistants restricted on managed devices
validations.remediation: Create configuration profiles restricting voice assistants on iOS and Android.

validations.name: App Store / Play Store Restrictions

validations.expectedValue: Official app stores only, sideloading blocked

validations.expectedValue: Managed browser required for corporate data access
validations.remediation: Create Android app protection policy requiring Microsoft Edge for corporate data access.

validations.description: Intune Mobile Application Management protecting corporate data in managed apps.
validations.expectedValue: MAM policies configured for iOS and Android
validations.remediation: Ensure MAM policies are configured for all platforms with data encryption and offline access controls.

validations.name: Compliance Policy Deployment Status
validations.description: Compliance policies assigned and deployed to target device groups.

validations.remediation: Review Android assignment and expand deployment to all BYOD devices. Investigate deployment failures.

validations.name: Configuration Profile Deployment
validations.description: Device restriction and security configuration profiles deployed to all platforms.
validations.remediation: Increase Android configuration profile deployment to meet Windows/iOS levels.

validations.name: Device Compliance Rate
validations.description: Percentage of managed devices compliant with all policies.
validations.remediation: Investigate non-compliant devices. Enforce remediation workflow.

validations.name: Managed Device Inventory
validations.description: Total managed devices and platform distribution.
validations.powershell: Get-MgDeviceManagementManagedDevice | Group-Object -Property platform | Select-Object Name, Count
validations.evidence: Total managed devices and platform distribution
validations.remediation: Monitor device inventory and platform distribution trends.

validations.name: Device Sync Health
validations.description: Devices syncing with Intune regularly (within 7 days).
validations.evidence: Device sync rate and stale device count
validations.remediation: Monitor stale devices; consider retiring devices not syncing for >60 days.

validations.name: Android Compliance Policies – Managed Devices
validations.description: Android Enterprise Fully Managed, Dedicated, and Corporate-Owned Work Profile devices must comply with Intune compliance policies.
validations.expectedValue: Android compliance policy exists, assigned to Android device groups, >=95% compliance coverage
validations.evidence: Policy count, assignments, compliance device states
validations.remediation: Ensure Android compliance policies exist, are assigned to all Android device groups, and required compliance settings (encryption, PIN, etc.) are configured. Target >=95% compliance coverage.

validations.name: Device Enrollment Notifications
validations.description: Enrollment notifications configured for new device enrollments to guide users through the process.
validations.expectedValue: Enrollment notification configuration exists, assigned, enabled
validations.evidence: Enrollment notification config count, assignments, enabled status
validations.remediation: Create enrollment notification configuration in Intune. Configure Enrollment Status Page (ESP), notification messages, and assign to enrollment groups.

validations.name: Windows Local Account Restrictions
validations.description: Prevent unauthorized local administrator creation and restrict local account usage to enforce centralized access control.
validations.expectedValue: Local admin restrictions policy exists, assigned, >=95% coverage
validations.remediation: Create Windows configuration profile restricting local administrator creation, disabling guest account, and restricting local account creation. Configure via Settings Catalog or Endpoint Security intents. Assign to all Windows device groups.

validations.name: Copilot License Assignment & Governance
validations.description: Copilot licenses assigned only to authorized users with proper governance controls
validations.expectedValue: Copilot licenses assigned to authorized users only
validations.evidence: Count and list of Copilot licensed users
validations.remediation: Review and restrict Copilot license assignments to authorized users. Remove licenses from contractors/external users. Enable license assignment governance via group-based licensing.

validations.name: Copilot Data Privacy Mode Enabled
validations.description: Copilot Data Privacy Mode enabled to prevent data retention by Microsoft for model improvement
validations.remediation: Enable Copilot Data Privacy Mode in Microsoft 365 to prevent data retention. Configure via Microsoft 365 admin center > Settings > Org settings > Copilot.

validations.name: Copilot Tenant Isolation Enforced
validations.description: Copilot tenant isolation enforced to prevent cross-tenant data access
validations.expectedValue: Copilot configured for single tenant only
validations.remediation: Ensure Copilot is configured for single-tenant deployment. Disable multi-tenant federation for Copilot. Verify no cross-tenant access policies allow Copilot data sharing.

validations.name: Copilot Feedback & Logging Audit
validations.description: Copilot user feedback and activity logging configured for audit and compliance
validations.expectedValue: Copilot activity logging enabled and auditable
validations.evidence: Count of logged Copilot activities in past 90 days
validations.remediation: Enable Copilot activity logging and configure audit retention to 365+ days. Monitor feedback submissions for sensitive data leaks. Configure alerts for suspicious Copilot usage patterns.

validations.name: Copilot Ground Truth Data Protection
validations.description: Sensitive data restricted from Copilot ground truth training to prevent inadvertent exposure
validations.expectedValue: Sensitive data types excluded from Copilot training
validations.evidence: List of excluded sensitive data types and policies
validations.remediation: Configure DLP policies to exclude Copilot ground truth from sensitive data (PII, secrets, confidential docs). Use content sensitivity labels to prevent Copilot indexing. Apply retention labels blocking Copilot access.

validations.name: Oversharing Detection - SharePoint AI Indexing
validations.description: Overshared SharePoint content identified and restricted from AI model indexing
validations.expectedValue: 0 overshared sites indexed by AI models
validations.remediation: Audit SharePoint sites with external sharing enabled. Apply sensitivity labels preventing Copilot indexing. Reduce sharing scope to specific users/groups. Monitor site sharing changes via audit logs.

validations.name: Oversharing Detection - OneDrive AI Indexing
validations.description: Overshared OneDrive content identified and restricted from AI model indexing
validations.powershell: Get-MgDriveItem -DriveId {driveId} -ItemId root | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Shares | Where-Object {$_.Identity -eq 'SharingLink'} | Measure-Object
validations.expectedValue: 0 overshared personal OneDrive files with external access
validations.remediation: Audit OneDrive sharing links with 'Anyone' access. Apply sensitivity labels preventing Copilot indexing. Convert overshared links to specific user/group sharing. Configure DLP to block external sharing of sensitive data.

validations.name: AI Plugin Security - Permission Minimization
validations.description: AI agent plugins and custom connectors have minimal Graph API permissions following least-privilege principle
validations.powershell: Get-MgApplication | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -match 'Agent|Plugin'} | Select-Object DisplayName, Id, RequiredResourceAccess
validations.expectedValue: All AI plugins with minimal required permissions only
validations.evidence: List of plugin permissions and scope
validations.remediation: Review each AI plugin's Graph API permissions. Remove unused scopes. Use application roles instead of admin consent. Implement permission approval workflows for new plugins. Monitor plugin usage via audit logs.

validations.name: AI Agent Secrets Management - Rotation
validations.description: AI agent client secrets and API keys rotated regularly (<=90 days) to reduce exposure risk
validations.powershell: Get-MgApplication -All | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -match 'Agent|Plugin'} | Select-Object DisplayName, PasswordCredentials, KeyCredentials | Where-Object {$_.PasswordCredentials.EndDateTime -lt (Get-Date).AddDays(90)}
validations.expectedValue: All AI agent secrets rotated within last 90 days
validations.evidence: Last secret rotation date and credential age
validations.remediation: Implement automated secret rotation for AI agents (max 90 days). Use Azure Key Vault for secret storage. Enable certificate-based auth instead of secrets. Configure rotation alerts at 60-day mark.

validations.name: AI Agent Access Logging & Audit
validations.description: AI agent access to data and Graph API operations logged and auditable
validations.expectedValue: 100% of AI agent operations logged with audit trail
validations.evidence: Count of logged agent operations in past 90 days
validations.remediation: Enable service principal sign-in audit logs. Configure 365+ day retention for audit data. Create alerts for anomalous agent activity (bulk data access, permission changes). Review logs monthly.

validations.name: AI Model Input Validation & Sanitization
validations.description: Inputs to AI models validated and sanitized to prevent prompt injection attacks
validations.expectedValue: Input validation and prompt injection guards implemented
validations.evidence: Code review of AI input handling and validation rules
validations.remediation: Implement input length limits for AI model queries. Add prompt injection detection (look for command markers). Validate input data types and formats. Use content moderation APIs. Test with adversarial prompts.

validations.name: AI Output Filtering & Content Moderation
validations.description: AI model outputs filtered and moderated to prevent inappropriate content delivery
validations.expectedValue: Content moderation and output filtering implemented
validations.evidence: List of moderation rules and policies applied to AI outputs
validations.remediation: Enable Azure Content Moderator for output filtering. Create content policies excluding sensitive topics (financial advice, medical diagnosis, legal guidance). Implement human review for flagged outputs. Use feedback loop to improve filters.

validations.name: Conditional Access - AI Agent Device Compliance
validations.description: Conditional Access policies enforce device compliance for AI agent access to sensitive data
validations.powershell: Get-AzureADConditionalAccessPolicy | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -match 'AI|Agent'} | Select-Object DisplayName, State, Conditions
validations.expectedValue: CA policy requiring compliant devices for AI agent access
validations.evidence: Conditional Access policy configuration and enforcement
validations.remediation: Create CA policy requiring Intune device compliance for AI agent service principals. Block legacy auth for agents. Require certificate-based auth. Monitor policy enforcement via sign-in logs.

validations.name: AI Training Data Governance - Retention Limits
validations.description: AI training data retention policies limit how long data is stored for model fine-tuning
validations.powershell: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy -RetentionRuleTypes Delete | Where-Object {$_.Name -match 'AI|Training'} | Select-Object Name, RetentionDuration
validations.evidence: Retention policy configuration for AI training data
validations.remediation: Set retention policy on AI training data folders to 180 days max. Exclude sensitive data from training datasets. Use labels to mark data for retention limits. Audit data purge operations.

validations.name: AI Bias & Fairness Monitoring
validations.description: AI model outputs monitored for bias and fairness across different user demographics
validations.expectedValue: Bias monitoring and fairness assessment implemented
validations.evidence: Bias detection framework and monitoring dashboard
validations.remediation: Implement fairness monitoring for AI outputs across demographics. Log outputs by user segment to detect bias patterns. Create alerts for skewed results by region/department. Conduct quarterly fairness audits.

validations.name: AI Model Version Control & Governance
validations.description: AI model versions controlled and tracked for reproducibility and rollback capability
validations.expectedValue: All AI models versioned with deployment tracking
validations.evidence: Model version control system and change logs
validations.remediation: Implement model versioning in Azure ML or similar platform. Track which model version deployed to production. Enable rollback to previous versions if issues detected. Document model changes and validations.

validations.name: DLP Policy for AI-Generated Content
validations.description: DLP policies prevent AI-generated content containing sensitive data from leaving the organization
validations.powershell: Get-DlpPolicy | Where-Object {$_.Name -match 'AI|Copilot'} | Select-Object Name, Rules, State
validations.expectedValue: DLP policies protecting AI-generated content with PII/secrets
validations.evidence: DLP policy configuration blocking sensitive data in Copilot output
validations.remediation: Create DLP rule monitoring Copilot outputs for sensitive patterns (credit cards, SSNs, API keys). Block sharing of high-confidence detections. Alert on medium-confidence matches for review. Test with sample data.

validations.name: AI Model Explainability & Transparency
validations.description: AI models designed with explainability to understand reasoning behind recommendations and decisions
validations.expectedValue: AI model decisions traceable to source data and reasoning
validations.evidence: Model explainability framework and sample decision traces
validations.remediation: Implement SHAP or LIME explainability frameworks for AI models. Document model decision logic and feature importance. Provide users with explanation of why specific recommendations were made. Enable audit trail for model inferences.

validations.name: Responsible AI Governance Board
validations.description: Responsible AI governance board established to oversee AI development, deployment, and compliance
validations.expectedValue: AI governance board chartered with policies and review cycle
validations.evidence: AI governance policy, board charter, meeting records, risk register
validations.remediation: Establish cross-functional AI governance board (security, legal, ethics, business). Define AI risk assessment framework. Implement review process for new AI initiatives. Conduct quarterly risk assessments. Document policies and decisions.

validations.name: AI Compliance Attestation & Reporting
validations.description: Regular AI security and compliance attestations performed and reported to leadership
validations.expectedValue: Quarterly AI security compliance reports generated
validations.evidence: AI security compliance reports, attestation documents, audit logs
validations.remediation: Establish monthly AI security audits covering data usage, permissions, incidents. Generate quarterly compliance reports for executive leadership. Perform annual third-party AI risk assessments. Document remediation of findings.

validations.name: Adversarial Testing & Red Teaming
validations.description: Regular adversarial testing and red teaming performed to identify AI model vulnerabilities
validations.expectedValue: Red team testing conducted quarterly with vulnerability remediation
validations.evidence: Red team testing reports, vulnerability findings, remediation tracking
validations.remediation: Conduct quarterly red team exercises attempting prompt injection, jailbreaks, poisoning attacks. Document vulnerabilities found and remediate before production. Use adversarial samples in testing. Measure model robustness metrics.

validations.name: AI Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA)
validations.description: Privacy Impact Assessments completed for all AI models handling personal data
validations.expectedValue: PIAs completed and approved for all AI systems
validations.evidence: PIA documents, data flow diagrams, privacy risk mitigation plans
validations.remediation: Conduct PIA for each AI model before deployment. Document data sources, usage, retention, and sharing. Identify privacy risks and mitigation strategies. Get legal/compliance approval. Update PIAs annually or when model changes.

validations.name: Data Classification Framework Implemented
validations.description: Organization-wide data classification framework defined and enforced (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted)
validations.evidence: List of classification types and usage count
validations.remediation: Define data classification policy (Public/Internal/Confidential/Restricted). Create corresponding DLP rules and sensitivity labels. Publish classification guide. Train users on data classification. Measure compliance monthly.

validations.name: Sensitivity Labels Applied to Sensitive Data
validations.description: Sensitivity labels automatically or manually applied to documents containing sensitive data
validations.expectedValue: >80% of sensitive documents labeled within 30 days of creation
validations.evidence: Count and percentage of labeled items by classification level
validations.remediation: Enable auto-labeling based on sensitive data patterns (PII, credit cards, SSNs). Configure label inheritance on folders. Create manual labeling workflows for edge cases. Monitor label application rates. Identify and relabel unlabeled sensitive items.

validations.name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP) Policies Comprehensive
validations.description: Comprehensive DLP policies protect sensitive data across email, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, and endpoints
validations.powershell: Get-DlpPolicy | Where-Object {$_.State -eq 'Enabled'} | Select-Object Name, Rules, State | Measure-Object
validations.expectedValue: 6+ DLP policies active (email, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, endpoint, cloud apps)
validations.evidence: List of active DLP policies and protected workloads
validations.remediation: Create DLP policies for each workload covering: Credit cards, SSNs, bank accounts, passwords, API keys, confidential data patterns. Set rules to: Alert on low-confidence, Block on high-confidence. Test with sample data. Monitor match rates weekly.

validations.name: Azure Information Protection (AIP) Deployed
validations.description: Azure Information Protection deployed for persistent data protection with encryption and usage rights
validations.expectedValue: AIP labels applied to 70%+ of sensitive documents
validations.evidence: Count of AIP-protected files by label and location
validations.remediation: Deploy AIP client to all user devices. Create AIP labels matching sensitivity levels. Enable automatic labeling rules. Configure usage rights (View, Edit, Forward, Print). Monitor protection rate. Test decryption scenarios.

validations.name: Content Search & eDiscovery Audit Logging
validations.description: All content search and eDiscovery activities logged and monitored for unauthorized data access
validations.expectedValue: 100% of content searches logged and audit retention >=365 days
validations.evidence: Count of logged content search activities in past 90 days
validations.remediation: Enable mailbox audit logging for all users. Enable Azure AD audit logging. Set retention to minimum 365 days. Create alerts for bulk export/search activities. Review audit logs monthly for anomalies. Implement RBAC for content search access.

validations.name: SharePoint Site Permissions Auditing
validations.description: SharePoint site permissions regularly audited and oversharing removed (external/excessive access)
validations.expectedValue: 0 sites with unrestricted external sharing; >95% internally shared sites restricted
validations.evidence: Count of sites by sharing level and external access configuration
validations.remediation: Audit all SharePoint sites for external sharing. Reduce unrestricted sites to <5%. Enable 'Site Sharing Restrictions' to org only. Implement sharing approval workflows. Monitor new external shares daily. Remove inactive external users quarterly.

validations.name: OneDrive Sharing Policy Enforcement
validations.description: OneDrive sharing policies restricted to prevent oversharing with external users
validations.expectedValue: OneDrive sharing restricted to 'ExistingExternalUserSharing' or more restrictive
validations.remediation: Set OneDrive sharing to 'Existing External User Sharing' (approved users only). Disable 'Anyone' links. Require link expiration (30 days). Disable file/folder download for sensitive sites. Monitor sharing link creation. Block downloads on unmanaged devices.

validations.name: Teams Guest Access Controls
validations.description: Teams guest access restricted and monitored to prevent data leakage through guest collaboration
validations.expectedValue: Guests cannot create channels; guest @mentions disabled; external access restricted
validations.remediation: Disable guest channel creation. Disable guest @mentions. Restrict external access by domain (whitelist only). Disable guest access in sensitive teams. Implement guest access reviews quarterly. Log all guest activities.

validations.name: Retention Policies Applied to All Workloads
validations.description: Retention policies configured across Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive for data lifecycle management
validations.powershell: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy | Where-Object {$_.Enabled -eq $true} | Select-Object Name, ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation | Measure-Object
validations.expectedValue: 5+ retention policies active across workloads with 7+ year retention for compliance data
validations.evidence: List of retention policies by workload
validations.remediation: Create retention policies for each workload (Email: 7 years, Docs: 7 years, Temp: 1 year). Set delete action for expired data. Apply to all users/sites. Exclude sensitive data from auto-delete. Monitor retention compliance. Test deletion workflows.

validations.name: Advanced Threat Protection (ATP) for SharePoint/OneDrive
validations.description: Advanced Threat Protection enabled for SharePoint and OneDrive to detect malware and suspicious files
validations.expectedValue: ATP enabled; malicious file detection active; suspicious file quarantine enabled
validations.evidence: ATP configuration status and threat detection metrics
validations.remediation: Enable ATP for SharePoint Online and OneDrive. Configure malware detection and quarantine. Set up alerts for threats detected. Review quarantine weekly. Test with sample malware files. Integrate with Defender for Office 365.

validations.name: Conditional Access - Unmanaged Device Data Blocking
validations.description: Conditional Access policies block download/sync of sensitive data on unmanaged devices
validations.powershell: Get-AzureADConditionalAccessPolicy | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -match 'Unmanaged|Device'} | Select-Object DisplayName, State, Conditions
validations.expectedValue: CA policy requiring managed devices for SharePoint/OneDrive access or blocking on unmanaged
validations.evidence: Conditional Access policy configuration for unmanaged device handling
validations.remediation: Create CA policy for high-risk data locations requiring managed/compliant devices. Set block action for unmanaged devices. Exclude emergency access accounts. Test with personal devices. Monitor policy enforcement. Provide device enrollment guidance.

validations.name: Tenant Restrictions V2 for Data Protection
validations.description: Tenant Restrictions v2 policies prevent unauthorized access to data in external tenants
validations.expectedValue: Tenant Restrictions v2 configured blocking all external tenants by default
validations.remediation: Enable Tenant Restrictions v2 via network firewall. Create allowlist of approved partner tenants only. Block all other cross-tenant access. Monitor cross-tenant access attempts. Implement policy for all users and devices.

validations.name: Insider Risk Management Enabled
validations.description: Insider Risk Management configured to detect and prevent data exfiltration and insider threats
validations.expectedValue: IRM enabled with policies for risky user activities
validations.evidence: IRM policy configuration and alert count from past 90 days
validations.remediation: Enable Insider Risk Management in Microsoft Purview. Configure policies for: Mass download, data exfiltration, abnormal access patterns, termination activities. Set alert thresholds. Create investigation workflows. Integrate with SIEM. Review alerts weekly.

validations.name: Communication Compliance - Data in Messages
validations.description: Communication compliance policies monitor Teams/Email for sensitive data sharing violations
validations.powershell: Get-CommunicationCompliancePolicy | Where-Object {$_.Enabled -eq $true} | Select-Object Name, Priority | Measure-Object
validations.expectedValue: 2+ communication compliance policies active for data protection
validations.evidence: Count of active policies and alerts from past 90 days
validations.remediation: Create communication policies detecting: PII sharing, confidential data exposure, external data transmission. Set actions: Alert, quarantine, escalate. Configure approval workflow. Review alerts within 24 hours. Escalate to legal/HR as needed.

validations.name: Information Barrier Policies for Data Separation
validations.description: Information barriers implemented to restrict data access between departments (e.g., Legal/Engineering, Sales/Operations)
validations.powershell: Get-InformationBarrierPolicy | Where-Object {$_.State -eq 'Active'} | Select-Object Identity, ExchangeConfig | Measure-Object
validations.expectedValue: Information barriers configured for 2+ critical department combinations
validations.evidence: List of active information barrier policies and protected segments
validations.remediation: Define data isolation requirements (Legal/Engineering, Sales/Operations, etc.). Create user segments. Configure barriers preventing communication/sharing. Test barrier effectiveness. Monitor barrier violations. Update barriers as org structure changes.

validations.name: Compliance Manager - Data Protection Controls
validations.description: Compliance Manager configured to track and measure data protection control compliance (GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA)
validations.expectedValue: 3+ compliance assessments active with 80%+ control implementation
validations.evidence: Compliance Manager assessment scores by regulation
validations.remediation: Create Compliance Manager assessments for applicable regulations (GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, SOC 2). Map controls to policies. Track implementation progress. Update quarterly. Assign owners to each control. Generate compliance reports.

validations.name: Data Residency & Geo-Compliance Enforced
validations.description: Data residency requirements enforced to ensure data stored in compliant geographical regions
validations.expectedValue: Data residency policies configured for all regulated data
validations.evidence: Geo-location policy configuration and data location verification
validations.remediation: Identify data residency requirements by regulation/customer. Configure geo-location restrictions. Deploy Multi-Geo if needed for Microsoft 365. Verify data location via tenant settings. Implement data residency monitoring. Test with data access from non-compliant regions.

validations.name: Recoverable Items Retention - Legal Hold
validations.description: Recoverable items retention configured for legal holds and investigations
validations.expectedValue: >95% of users/mailboxes support litigation hold; recovery time 30+ days
validations.evidence: Count of users with litigation hold enabled and retention days
validations.remediation: Enable litigation hold on all user mailboxes (minimum 30 days retention). Configure for OneDrive/Teams content. Test hold effectiveness. Document hold policies. Create legal hold runbook. Monitor holds for expiration.

validations.name: Data Subject Rights Automation
validations.description: Data Subject Rights requests (GDPR/CCPA) automated and tracked through end-to-end workflow
validations.expectedValue: DSR requests processed within SLA (30-45 days); >80% automation coverage
validations.evidence: DSR request logs and processing time metrics
validations.remediation: Create DSR workflow (receive, collect, review, respond). Use Compliance Manager for content search. Configure automated notifications. Implement approval workflow. Document SLA (30-45 days). Track metrics: volume, time, response rate. Audit compliance.

validations.name: eDiscovery & Litigation Hold Management
validations.description: eDiscovery cases managed with proper holds, permissions, and audit trails for legal/compliance investigations
validations.powershell: Get-ComplianceCase | Where-Object {$_.Status -eq 'Active'} | Select-Object Name, CaseStatus, Owners | Measure-Object
validations.expectedValue: eDiscovery cases with audit logs; holds configured; RBAC enforced
validations.evidence: Count of active cases and audit trail completeness
validations.remediation: Create eDiscovery governance policies. Configure case management workflow. Enable audit logging. Enforce RBAC (investigators only). Place holds on relevant data sources. Document cases. Perform monthly case reviews. Archive closed cases.

validations.name: Insider Risk Management Enabled
validations.description: Insider Risk Management policies detect and respond to risky user behaviors
validations.expectedValue: Insider risk policies configured and enabled
validations.evidence: Count of active policies and detections
validations.remediation: Create insider risk policies. Configure risk indicators. Enable Azure AD audit logging. Implement alerts and case management.

validations.name: Communication Compliance Policies
validations.description: Communication Compliance monitors Teams, Exchange for policy violations
validations.expectedValue: Communication compliance policies enabled for Teams and Exchange
validations.remediation: Enable communication compliance. Create policies for sensitive content. Configure alert routing. Review cases monthly.

validations.name: Audit Logging Comprehensive
validations.description: Comprehensive audit logging across Exchange, Teams, SharePoint for forensic investigation
validations.expectedValue: Audit logging enabled for all workloads with 365-day retention
validations.evidence: Audit log status and retention settings
validations.remediation: Enable audit logging. Set retention to 365+ days. Configure alerts for sensitive activities. Test log collection.

validations.name: Subject Rights Requests (DSR) Tracking
validations.description: Data Subject Requests tracked and fulfilled within SLA
validations.evidence: DSR count by status and SLA compliance
validations.remediation: Configure DSR workflow. Assign case owners. Set SLA alerts. Document fulfillment. Review monthly.

validations.name: Data Residency Compliance
validations.description: Data residency set for multi-region compliance (GDPR, CCPA, etc.)
validations.expectedValue: Preferred data location configured for all workloads
validations.remediation: Configure preferred data location in M365 admin center. Verify for each workload.

validations.name: Sensitivity Labels Published

validations.remediation: Create classification labels. Configure retention/encryption. Publish policies. Train users.

validations.name: Auto-Labeling Rules Configured
validations.description: Auto-labeling policies automatically classify sensitive content
validations.expectedValue: Auto-labeling rules for credit cards, SSN, health data
validations.remediation: Create auto-labeling rules. Configure sensitivity indicators. Test patterns. Monitor effectiveness.

validations.name: Anonymous Links Disabled

validations.name: Encryption in Transit (TLS)
validations.description: All data in transit encrypted with TLS 1.2+

validations.name: Encryption at Rest

validations.expectedValue: AES-256 encryption enabled for Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive

validations.name: Customer Key Enabled
validations.description: Customer-managed encryption key (CMK) for sensitive data
validations.expectedValue: Customer Key configured for Exchange and SharePoint

validations.name: Double Key Encryption Enabled
validations.description: Double Key Encryption (DKE) for files with two keys (Microsoft + Customer)
validations.expectedValue: DKE labels configured for highest classified data
validations.remediation: Deploy DKE server. Create DKE labels. Configure key storage. Train users on handling DKE-protected docs.

validations.name: DLP Policy Enforcement

validations.expectedValue: ≥2 DLP policies in enforce mode (Exchange, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive, Endpoint)
